description: Override maps a kind source file to a local replacement.

^(skipHooks)$.description:
When true, all hooks are skipped on this particular file. Allows
 you to bring your own files instead of using what the registry
 provides.

path.description:
Local path to the override file. Resolved relative to the
 resource file that declares this override, or used as-is when
 absolute.

skip_hooks.description:
When true, all hooks are skipped on this particular file. Allows
 you to bring your own files instead of using what the registry
 provides.

source.description: Path of the source file in the kind being replaced.

title: Override
